_README: Allowlist of files that the JSON-LD validator may report but never gate CI. EMPTY as of 2026-06-08 (review item P4): the 9 legacy entries were retired — protocol/blockchain-account, linked-resources/format, metric and tags are survey-data files dereferenced by the studio survey-choices API (kept as plain JSON, so the validator skips them; their semantic SKOS companions live at protocol/blockchain-account-types, protocol/media-formats, protocol/metric-types and protocol/{asset,dao,deed,oracle,group,pod,project}-types/v1); the schema.org scrape (protocol/attributes/v1/index.json), the stale attributes/* instance files, the EU-taxonomy scrape (activity/v1) and the malformed measure/v1 stub were deleted. Add a "path/to/file.json": "reason" entry only if a genuinely-broken file must be tolerated.
